antipattern.description: Generator system prompt is generic ('be helpful'); no answer-only-from-context constraint.
antipattern.reason: Model leaks training knowledge confidently. Detector: faithfulness < 0.85. Fix: r1-strict-answer-prompt.

antipattern.description: Only one chunker strategy supported; doc type changes require code change.
antipattern.reason: Switching cost prevents tuning. Detector: chunker.strategy is a constant. Fix: r2-multi-strategy-chunker.

antipattern.description: Every update triggers full re-embed of the corpus.
antipattern.reason: Cost + downtime spike. Detector: incremental == false on a large corpus. Fix: r5-incremental-index.
